task_summary: ms3-landing-refresh-and-review-followups subtask-4: security fix enforcing full public-visibility predicate in listComments UUID-fallback path. GET /api/blog/:postId/comments for a future-scheduled post (published but publishedAt in future) now returns 404 via UUID path via findPublishedById. Modified files: apps/api/src/blog/blog.service.ts (added findPublishedById with full predicate) and apps/api/src/blog/blog.controller.ts (listComments updated to use findPublishedById).
commands_run: pnpm --filter @sfus/api lint (pre-existing navigation.controller.test.ts lint failure — unrelated to this subtask)

pass_fail_totals.note: 66 blog service tests pass; 6 pre-existing failures in navigation.controller.test.ts are unrelated to this subtask

final_test_outcomes: AC1 PASS: findPublishedById returns null for future-scheduled post (published, publishedAt in future); listComments UUID-fallback path returns 404 as required.
AC1 PASS: findPublishedById query includes LessThanOrEqual publishedAt constraint — full public-visibility predicate enforced.
AC2 PASS: findPublishedById returns post for genuinely public post (published, publishedAt in past); comment listing path unchanged.
AC2 PASS: findPublished and findPublishedBySlug assertions tightened to verify publishedAt constraint is present in the query where clause.
AC3 PASS: findPublishedById returns null for draft post; draft/unpublished posts continue to return 404 via UUID fallback.
LINT NOTE: 1 pre-existing lint error in navigation.controller.test.ts (unused import of UnauthorizedException) — not introduced by this subtask.
acceptance_criteria_validated: AC1: GET /api/blog/:postId/comments for future-scheduled post (published, publishedAt in future) returns 404 via UUID path — PASS
AC2: Comment listing for genuinely public posts unchanged (both slug and UUID paths) — PASS
AC3: Draft/unpublished posts continue to return 404 via UUID fallback — PASS
implementation_context: Implementer commits: 58c14ed (fix: enforce full public-visibility predicate in listComments UUID-fallback), c1f7a24 (chore: write implementer success artifacts)
Tester commit: aa795a6 (test: add regression tests for findPublishedById public-visibility predicate)
modified_files_for_documentation: apps/api/src/blog/blog.service.ts — added findPublishedById with full public-visibility predicate (status=published AND publishedAt<=now)
apps/api/src/blog/blog.controller.ts — listComments updated to use findPublishedById for UUID-fallback path
apps/api/src/blog/blog.service.test.ts — added 4 new regression tests for findPublishedById; tightened 2 existing predicate assertions
documentation_context: The listComments endpoint (GET /api/blog/:postId/comments) now enforces the full public-visibility predicate for both slug and UUID lookup paths.
Future-scheduled posts (status=published, publishedAt in future) are now correctly hidden from the comments endpoint when addressed by UUID, matching the behavior for slug-addressed posts.
The new findPublishedById method is a security-critical guard on a publicly reachable endpoint.
plan_and_diff_context: Subtask 4 addresses publication leakage via the UUID-fallback path in listComments.
The fix adds findPublishedById with the same LessThanOrEqual(now) publishedAt constraint used by findPublishedBySlug and findPublished.
cleanup_notes: No temporary byproducts created. artifact_input.json written to shared artifact directory for record-keeping.
